name: caching
title: Caching & Rate Limiting
description: Redis-based caching and rate limiting via Upstash with configurable per-route limits.
docs: Redis caching and rate limiting via Upstash. Set `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL` and `UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN` to enable. Configure per-route rate limits in `config/rate-limits.ts`.
